description: DVLSProvider configures a store to sync secrets using Devolutions Server.

auth.description: Auth defines the authentication method to use.

insecure.description: Insecure allows connecting to DVLS over plain HTTP. This is NOT RECOMMENDED for production use. Set to true only if you understand the security implications.

serverUrl.description: ServerURL is the DVLS instance URL (e.g., https://dvls.example.com).
